data.title: Turkey's GDP growth in Q2 surpasses Europe's largest economies, with 4.8% growth beating forecasts of 3.8%. Construction and IT sectors drove growth. German economy grew by only 0.2%, French GDP by 0.8%, and Spain's economy by 2.8% in Q2. Investments in Turkey grew by 8.8% YoY, with construction expanding by 10.9% and information/communication by 7.1%. Turkish exports fell 0.9% YoY to $21.8 billion in August. Turkey's economy is defying tighter financial conditions despite political tensions. President Erdogan's actions remain a threat to GDP and investor sentiment.
data.description: The Turkish economy exceeded expectations in the second quarter, with a 4.8% annual GDP growth, surpassing forecasts of 3.8%. In comparison, Germany grew by 0.2%, France by 0.8%, and Spain by 2.8%. ING Think highlighted the rise was mainly due to domestic demand, with investments growing by 8.8%, led by construction. Construction grew by 10.9% and IT by 7.1%, but agriculture slowed by 3.5%. Despite challenges like export decline of 0.9% to $21.8 billion in August, and political tensions affecting investor sentiment, Turkey's economy continued to perform well. The Turkish president's actions against opposition groups pose a potential threat to future growth.

data.title: Yorkville Acquisition Corp. changes ticker symbol to "MCGA" before Trump Media Group listing.
data.description: Yorkville Acquisition Corp. has revealed that it will change its ticker symbol to "MCGA" in preparation for the Trump Media Group CRO Strategy, Inc. listing. This move comes as the company gears up for significant developments in their business strategy.

data.title: Dubai Fashion Week SS 2026 begins at D3, partnering with SOUEAST for new mobility aesthetics; brand revival in 2024 popular among youth.
data.description: The Dubai Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2026 kicked off at Dubai Design District (D3), uniting industry leaders and celebrities to honor a fusion of global fashion cultures and interdisciplinary inspiration. SOUEAST, the event's official partner, has gained notice from younger consumers following its brand relaunch in 2024. This success is attributed to its chic brand identity and ethos of "EASE YOUR LIFE."
